title: AquaFunded Pricing Explained: All Plans, Costs & Fees (2026)

excerpt: Complete breakdown of AquaFunded pricing — all plans, hidden fees, and how to save money.
content:
AquaFunded Pricing Overview

AquaFunded is a Dubai-based prop trading firm that positions itself as an accessible entry point into proprietary trading with accounts starting at just $19 per month. Unlike traditional prop firms that may require large upfront capital, AquaFunded offers a tiered pricing structure tied to account funding levels and challenge difficulty. The firm provides four main pricing tiers ranging from instant funding accounts to premium challenges with six-figure account sizes, making it competitive for both beginner traders and experienced professionals seeking capital.

All AquaFunded Plans Compared

AquaFunded offers four distinct pricing tiers, each corresponding to a different trading challenge and account funding level. Here's the complete breakdown:

Plan Name Account Size Monthly Cost Challenge Type Best For
Instant Funding $2,500 $19/month No evaluation phase Traders wanting immediate capital
2-Step Challenge $10,000 $97/month 2-phase evaluation Intermediate traders
1-Step Challenge $25,000 $199/month Single evaluation phase Experienced traders
2-Step Challenge (Premium) $100,000 $549/month 2-phase evaluation Professional/serious traders

What You Get:

  • Access to forex, indices, commodities, and crypto markets
  • Paper trading for practice and evaluation
  • Mobile app for on-the-go trading
  • Automated trading capabilities
  • Performance analytics and detailed reporting
  • Risk management tools including drawdown limits and position sizing rules
  • No time limits on evaluation phases (a significant advantage over competitors)
  • Fast 24-hour payout processing after completing a 14-day holding period
  • Scaling pathway up to $2 million funded accounts for successful traders

Profit Splits: AquaFunded offers profit splits ranging up to 100% as an add-on feature, though the exact split structure depends on your challenge tier and any premium upgrades you select. This is notably aggressive compared to some competitors who cap profit splits at 80-90%.

Free Plan / Free Trial

AquaFunded does not offer a free tier or traditional free trial. However, the platform includes paper trading functionality within each paid challenge, allowing you to practice with simulated capital before risking real account profits. This paper trading phase is built into the evaluation process rather than being a separate free offering.

For traders completely new to prop challenges, the $19/month Instant Funding plan serves as the most accessible entry point. While not free, it's the lowest-cost option available and provides immediate access to a $2,500 trading account without an evaluation phase—making it practical for testing AquaFunded's platform before committing to higher-tier challenges.

Hidden Costs and Fees

AquaFunded's pricing structure has several important considerations beyond the base monthly cost:

  • Account Forfeiture on Hard Breach: If you breach your account's risk management rules before completing your 4th payout, your challenge fees are forfeited. This is a critical distinction—you lose your entire monthly investment if you violate trading rules early in the evaluation phase.
  • 14-Day Holding Period: Even after passing evaluation, there's a mandatory 14-day holding period before payouts are processed. While the 24-hour payout after this period is fast, the initial delay should be factored into your cash flow planning.
  • Premium Add-Ons: The mentioned "up to 100% profit split" appears to be an add-on to base plans, though exact pricing for this upgrade isn't detailed in standard marketing materials. Contact AquaFunded directly for add-on costs.
  • AquaFutures Separate Product: Futures trading requires a separate AquaFutures product, not included in standard account pricing.
  • No Stocks Trading: If you need stocks access, AquaFunded isn't suitable—you'd need to supplement with another platform or service.
  • Data and Market Feeds: No mention of data subscription fees, suggesting these may be included, but confirm this during signup.

AquaFunded Pricing vs Competitors

Comparing AquaFunded to other prop trading firms reveals some pricing strengths and trade-offs:

Firm Entry Level Cost Entry Account Size Profit Split Key Differentiator
AquaFunded $19/month $2,500 Up to 100% Instant funding, no time limits
Prop Firm A (est.) $99/month $5,000 80% Established track record
Prop Firm B (est.) $149/month $10,000 90% Premium customer support

AquaFunded's Price Advantage: The $19/month entry point is exceptionally low, making AquaFunded one of the cheapest ways to access proprietary capital. The Instant Funding tier has no evaluation phase, which saves time compared to competitors requiring 1-3 challenge phases.

Trade-Offs: AquaFunded is relatively new (founded 2023) with limited long-term historical data. The 3.2/5 Trustpilot rating and flagged guideline breaches warrant research before committing significant capital. More established competitors, despite higher pricing, may offer greater stability and customer protection.

Is AquaFunded Worth the Price?

Value Assessment by Trader Type:

Instant Funding ($19/month) — Best For:

  • Complete beginners wanting low-risk entry into prop trading
  • Part-time traders testing a platform before larger investment
  • Forex and crypto traders who trade high-frequency
  • Traders on tight budgets

This plan's $2,500 account and instant funding make it attractive for learning, though the capital is limited for meaningful profit scaling. At $19/month, the cost is negligible—the real risk is whether you can trade profitably within the platform's constraints.

2-Step Challenge ($97/month) — Best For:

  • Intermediate swing traders with 6+ months experience
  • Traders comfortable with a 2-phase evaluation process
  • Those seeking $10,000 starting capital without instant gratification

At ~$97/month, you're paying for a structured evaluation that vets your strategy. If you pass, the $10K account offers more meaningful profit potential. The annual cost (~$1,164) is moderate for traders who believe they can pass evaluation consistently.

1-Step Challenge ($199/month) — Best For:

  • Experienced traders with proven track records
  • Those confident enough to skip the 2-step process
  • Forex/commodities traders with established systems

At ~$199/month (~$2,388/year), you're betting on your expertise. The $25K account provides legitimate scaling potential. This plan makes sense only if you've demonstrated consistent profitability elsewhere.

Premium 2-Step Challenge ($549/month) — Best For:

  • Professional traders and serious money-makers
  • Those with $100K+ annual trading budgets
  • Traders seeking $100,000+ funded accounts from day one

At $549/month (~$6,588/year), you're accessing serious capital. This only makes financial sense if you're confident in generating returns exceeding the annual fee across the $100K account. For professional traders, the ROI can justify this cost.

Overall Worth Assessment: AquaFunded offers good value for beginners and intermediate traders due to low entry pricing. However, the mixed reviews, relatively new firm status, and account forfeiture policy create risk. The platform is worth trying at the $19/month tier, but higher tiers require confidence in both your trading and AquaFunded's stability.

How to Save on AquaFunded

AquaFunded's pricing structure has limited discount mechanisms compared to some competitors:

  • No Annual Billing Discount: Unlike some SaaS platforms, AquaFunded appears to charge monthly rates without significant discounts for annual prepayment. Confirm this with their sales team—some prop firms offer 10-20% discounts for annual commitments.
  • No Public Coupon Codes: No widely advertised promotional codes exist, though AquaFunded may offer limited-time promotions during announcements or partnerships. Follow their social media for flash promotions.
  • Referral Program (Potential): Many prop firms offer referral bonuses. Check AquaFunded's website for a referral program that could offset costs if you bring new traders to the platform.
  • Start with Instant Funding: The pragmatic approach to saving is starting with the $19/month Instant Funding tier to validate your profitability before upgrading. This minimizes sunk costs during your learning phase.
  • No Student or Institutional Discounts: AquaFunded doesn't advertise educational pricing, though institutional traders might negotiate custom arrangements directly.

For the most current promotions and potential discounts, contact AquaFunded's support team directly.

Have questions about AquaFunded pricing? Check the full AquaFunded review or compare with our prop firm comparison guide. See what other traders think on our AquaFunded review page.
